log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aven — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:13+9=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Aven — Iron Concentration (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aven — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Aven — Iron Concentration. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Aven — Iron Concentration.
→ Aven — Iron Concentration: CON save [d20:20+8=28 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 16 necrotic damage (half).
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Aven — Iron Concentration --- HP: 51/67 | AC: 14

ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.

ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Aven — Iron Concentration: FAIL! 23 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.

══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Aven — Iron Concentration --- HP: 1/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (1/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Aven — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Aven — Iron Concentration: FAIL! 24 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):17+8=25 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
